# Hobo & Bolt — Kit Catalogue

Every modular kit published to the Roblox Creator Store by **Hobo & Bolt**.

**→ [Browse the catalogue](https://stickwithfiddle-sys.github.io/hobo-bolt-wiki/)**
**→ [Walk the showroom in Roblox](https://www.roblox.com/games/109607265146402/Hobo-Bolt-Kit-Showroom)**

Each kit is a drop-in Model of separate, named MeshParts — grid-snappable, recolorable, Studio-ready.

---

*Auto-generated. Do not hand-edit — run `python businesses/roblox/build_wiki.py` in the pipeline repo.
Kit thumbnails are served from Roblox's own CDN, so they self-update. `data.json` is the machine-readable
catalogue.*
